case_title: CARLOTTA VELIZ VS. HOLLYWOOD ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT HOLLYWOOD ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION'S DEMURRER CONTINUED FROM SEP-04-2002 TO LAW AND MOTION AT SEP-18-2002, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER COUNSELS' STIPULATION TO CONTINUE MOTION WHICH THE COURT GRANTED. (AJR) REPORTER: PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193 (302)
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-04-2002 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEMURRER - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (SUSTAIN DEMURRER WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. (1)TO IDENTIFY THE TYPE OF CONTRACT, SEE CCP 430.10(G); (2)TO SEGREGATE DISTINCT CAUSES OF ACTION SEE CRC 312(G) AND (3)TO PLEAD VIOLATION OF CC 1671(D) AND 10504 OF THE COMMERCIAL CODE AS AN UNLAWFUL BUSINESS PRACTICE UNDER B&P 17200 OR IN A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF UNDER CCP 1060. VIOLATION OF B&P 17200 (3RD CAUSE OF ACTION) NEEDS TO PLEAD WITH MORE PARTICULARITY BY IDENTIFYING TYPE OF CONTRACT SEE KHOURY V. MALY'S OF CA (1993) 14 CAL.APP.4TH 612, 614). PLTF HAS 30 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. (AJR/KS(EX)), REPORTER: ERIC THRONE, CSR#7855

Off Calendar Sep-18-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: C. Brooks Cutter, Esq. 916/381-9011 for pltf & opposing party; Gayle M. Athanacio, Esq. 882-5077 for deft & moving party.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling (SUSTAIN DEMURRER WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. (1)TO IDENTIFY THE TYPE OF CONTRACT, SEE CCP 430.10(G); (2)TO SEGREGATE DISTINCT CAUSES OF ACTION SEE CRC 312(G) AND (3)TO PLEAD VIOLATION OF CC 1671(D) AND 10504 OF THE COMMERCIAL CODE AS AN UNLAWFUL BUSINESS PRACTICE UNDER B&P 17200 OR IN A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF UNDER CCP 1060. VIOLATION OF B&P 17200 (3RD CAUSE OF ACTION) NEEDS TO PLEAD WITH MORE PARTICULARITY BY IDENTIFYING TYPE OF CONTRACT SEE KHOURY V. MALY'S OF CA (1993) 14 CAL.APP.4TH 612, 614). Pltf has 30 days leave to amend. (AJR/KS(EX))
